name: bang chan

𐙚 | "she asked me if I do this everyday I said often" : the weekend - often

1/3 producer 3racha

you and chan had always been close friends, taking each other out on "friendly" dates, meeting each other's parents and often cuddling to sleep-- so it wasn't like him to give you attitude when you walked into his studio. it was obvious that he seemed pissed off, and you couldn't just leave him like that.. right?

i'm so in love with this y'all don't get annoyed dom chan like me
